behavior: Append-only migrations and typed operations add bounded local v3 records safely.
revision_scope: The clean committed Milestone 2 implementation before the evidence-only Gate 2 state transition.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS node scripts/dev/run-cargo.mjs test -p jobsentinel-domain --all-features
commands.relevant_result: All 104 domain tests and 5 documentation tests passed, including typed case files, closed event metadata, concrete graph links, protected receipts, monotonic source policy, and compatibility metadata.
commands.caveat: Live credential-store integration was explicitly disabled; the domain crate does not need it.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS node scripts/dev/run-cargo.mjs test -p jobsentinel-storage --lib
commands.relevant_result: All 642 storage unit tests passed, including fresh migration, real v2.9 fixture migration, failure and retry, concurrent snapshot publication, restore to the primary path, protected receipt constraints, source-policy monotonicity, and unsupported-newer refusal.
commands.caveat: Live keyring tests and storage integration binaries that can reach production credential paths were intentionally not executed unattended.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS node scripts/dev/run-cargo.mjs test -p jobsentinel-application v3_foundation
commands.relevant_result: Both focused application tests passed for case-file create and reuse and mismatched event-metadata rejection.
commands.caveat: The operations remain Rust application functions with no Tauri or renderer command surface.

commands.command: cargo clippy -p jobsentinel-domain -p jobsentinel-storage -p jobsentinel-application --lib -- -D warnings
commands.relevant_result: The changed production-library owners passed Clippy with warnings denied.
commands.caveat: The repository all-targets test lint lane contains pre-existing test-only unwrap and expect findings; this focused production lane is the smallest relevant Milestone 2 check.

commands.relevant_result: All migrations 0 through 11 applied to an isolated database, every workspace owner compiled against SQLx offline metadata, and migration 11 passed.
commands.caveat: The v3 database schema generation remains 2; SQLx migration sequence 11 is a distinct compatibility dimension.

commands.command: npm run harness:check && npm run lint:file-size && npm run lint:architecture && npm run lint:security && cargo fmt --all -- --check && git diff --check
commands.relevant_result: Harness, file-size hard limits, architecture ownership, security sensors, secret scanning, Rust formatting, and diff hygiene passed.
commands.caveat: Eight changed files reached the modularization review threshold without exceeding hard limits. Repository GitHub Actions remain temporarily disabled by user direction.

commands.relevant_result: The full pre-v3 migration chain remains byte-identical to the published v2.9.5 source revision.

decisions.gate_2: Approve the minimum case-file, event, graph, receipt, source-policy, and compatibility model for Milestones 3 through 8.
decisions.case_files: Create at most one opportunity case file per job. Reuse it atomically and reject missing jobs without a read-then-write race.
decisions.events: Write new v3 history only to a typed append-only ledger with closed metadata variants, an exact 2 KiB serialized bound, and mandatory local_only plus sensitive labels. Keep the legacy application event ledger historical and do not backfill it.
decisions.graphs: Store concrete career and source links with owned provenance references. Do not add a generic graph engine.
decisions.receipts: Store bounded typed privacy receipts locally. Military service, clearance claims, and protected veteran answers require local_only plus sensitive labels and cannot be declared public or external-AI eligible.
decisions.source_policy: Persist closed source access and review states. Policy changes may become more restrictive but cannot silently weaken.
decisions.compatibility: Keep compatibility line 3, database schema generation 2, and SQLx migration sequence 11 as distinct values.
decisions.migration_recovery: Before pending migration DDL, publish one verified same-device encrypted recovery snapshot for the exact transition and reuse it on retry. This is internal recovery, not portable backup or export.
decisions.newer_data: Refuse unsupported newer plaintext or encrypted databases before writable access. Plaintext refusal occurs before loading or creating a database key, and WAL-aware probing observes crash-retained schema state.
decisions.credential_tests: Keep live keyring tests opt-in. Unattended Milestone 2 checks unset JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS and avoid storage integration paths that can reach production credentials.

review.adversarial_verdict: PASS WITH FINDINGS after privacy-label, key-load ordering, WAL probing, atomic snapshot publication, configuration ordering, concurrency, and atomic case-file corrections
remaining_findings: Run live hard-link and restore behavior on Windows 11, macOS 26, and Linux in the release matrix.
Revisit cross-version concurrent snapshot pruning with Milestone 3 cleanup and rollback.
Portable backup and export, user-facing restore, rollback, broader newer-v3 handling, and support guidance remain Milestone 3 work.
